summary: Full end-to-end testing of the Properties module (Phase 8). 35/35 backend pytest tests passed including real Cloudinary signature + direct multipart upload to cloud `dd61mc8me` and persistence into a Property's images[]. Frontend flows verified end-to-end on the external preview URL for both ADMIN and AGENT: /properties grid+filter+modal+detail+matching-leads, RBAC gating, owner-select hidden for AGENT, view toggle persisted in localStorage, no console errors. Regression on /api/health, leads, follow-ups, communications, analytics, users all 200.
critical_code_review_comments: property.controller.ts validateRequired() only checks `title/propertyType/location/city/price/area` — but the GET listProperties accepts an `ownerAgentId` query string that bypasses RBAC scope (no role check). Not a bug per spec ('Both ADMIN and AGENT view all'), but worth a comment so future RBAC tightening is intentional.
property.service.ts toDto() leaks `_id`-free Prisma objects (Prisma never returns `_id` so this is safe), but the function uses `any` and spreads — consider typing it for future maintainability.

cloudinary.service.ts ALLOWED_FOLDER_PREFIXES = ['properties/', 'properties'] permits `properties_evil` because startsWith('properties') is true. Recommend tightening to exact 'properties' or prefix 'properties/'. Severity: low (folder is server-signed so attack surface is narrow, but worth fixing).
PropertyDetailPage shows description block only when description is non-empty — correct, but consider showing the heading with an em-dash placeholder for consistency.

PropertyImageUploader: file rejection error and size limit messaging not exercised in this run (UI flow only; backend doesn't see rejected files since they fail client-side). Recommend a future test that drops a >5MB image and asserts the inline error appears.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_ properties created during pytest and one TEST_FE pair created during the Playwright run — ALL deleted at the end via DELETE /api/properties/:id (204). Neon DB is back to pre-test state. The matching-leads sidebar matched 2 existing seed leads (TEST_UI_Good_108360406 and Priya Sharma) which confirms the matching algorithm works against real data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Properties module is solid. Backend test file `backend/tests/test_properties.py` doubles as regression for future iterations and includes a real (non-mocked) Cloudinary E2E upload. data-testids for Properties UI are: properties-page, add-property-button, view-grid-button, view-list-button, property-search-input, property-filter-{type,city,status,min-price,max-price}, property-clear-filters, property-card-:id, property-{title,location,city,price,area,bedrooms,bathrooms,description}-input/textarea, property-{type,status,areaunit,owner}-select, property-image-{uploader,dropzone,input,thumb}, remove-image-button, property-form-{error,submit}, property-detail-page, back-to-properties-button, edit-property-button, delete-property-button, matching-leads-sidebar, matching-lead-:id, open-matching-lead-:id. Sidebar nav uses nav-properties (lowercased label), NOT sidebar-nav-properties.
verified_flows: Backend POST /properties validation (title/price/area)
Backend POST /properties ownerAgentId: ADMIN may set, AGENT always overwritten to self
Backend GET /properties pagination + city (CI) + status + type + price range + search + sort
Backend GET /properties: ADMIN total === AGENT total (per spec view all)
Backend GET /properties/:id 404
Backend PUT /properties/:id: ADMIN any, AGENT only own (403 otherwise), AGENT cannot reassign owner (403)
Backend PATCH /properties/:id/assign: AGENT 403, ADMIN sets+clears owner
Backend GET /properties/:id/matching-leads: ADMIN sees all, AGENT scoped to assignedAgentId or null; excludes WON/LOST; includes nextFollowUp + matchScore
Backend GET /uploads/cloudinary-signature: 401 unauth, 400 for users/ folder, 200 with cloudName=dd61mc8me + correct uploadUrl
Real Cloudinary multipart upload using signed payload — secure_url returned and stored on Property.images[]
Backend DELETE /properties/:id: AGENT 403 for others, ADMIN 204 + verified GET 404
Regression: /health, /leads, /followups, /communications, /analytics/overview, /users all 200
Frontend: admin login → /properties → all 6 filter inputs visible, clear-filters appears when dirty
Frontend: view toggle persists in localStorage key `properties:view` (= 'list' or 'grid')
Frontend: Add modal shows all 14 fields incl. owner-select for ADMIN, validation surfaces 'Title is required'
Frontend: Property card click → /properties/:id → all detail tiles + matching-leads-sidebar mount
Frontend RBAC: AGENT on admin-owned property → Edit + Delete hidden
Frontend RBAC: AGENT on own property → Edit + Delete visible
Frontend RBAC: AGENT does NOT see owner-select in the create modal
Console: zero JS errors during full E2E run
